name: vit-6_chrIV_locus
description: vit-6 single-gene locus on C. elegans chromosome IV. vit-6 (yp115/yp88 class) is the sole non-chrX vitellogenin and is more divergent (~40% identity) from the chrX vit-1..vit-5 cluster. It is processed into two yolk polypeptides (yp115 and yp88). Multi-mapping with the chrX cluster is limited but possible in highly conserved domains.
